hypothesis: Fine-tuning SAM 2 on synthetic liquid-phase TEM video data will produce a segmentation model (SAM-EM) that achieves superior real-time particle segmentation accuracy compared to a U-Net baseline across varying signal-to-noise conditions, because SAM 2's video-aware architecture and memory mechanism enable robust temporal propagation of object masks that compensates for the low contrast and noise inherent in LPTEM imaging.
